3D

0.1 Packages

import Pkg; Pkg.add("PGFPlotsX")
using Plots
using PGFPlotsX
using LaTeXStrings
pkgversion(PGFPlotsX)
v"1.6.2"

1 Plot3

1.1 scatter

pgfplotsx()

default(size=(300,300),
        xlabel="x",
        ylabel="y", 
        zlabel="f(x,y)",
        framestyle=:box, 
        leg=false,
        xlimits=(-4,4),
        ylimits=(-5,5),
        )
scatter([0],[0],[0], seriestype=:scatter,)

1.2 plot

using Plots
pgfplotsx()

default(size=(300,300),
        title="plane geometry",
        xlabel="x",
        ylabel="y", 
        zlabel="f(x,y)",
        framestyle=:box, 
        leg=false,
        xlimits=(-4,4),
        ylimits=(-5,5),
        zlimits=(-4,4),
        )
x = [-4, 4,4,-4,-4]
y = [-5,-5,5, 5,-5]
z = -x/6+y/2
scatter([0],[0],[0], seriestype=:scatter,)
plot!(x,y,z, markershape=:circle)

1.3 Expression

@pgf Axis(
    {
        xlabel = L"x",
        ylabel = L"y"
    },
    Plot3(
        Expression("-x/6+y/2")
    )
)

1.4 surf

x = range(-4; stop = 4, length = 20)
y = range(-5; stop = 5, length = 25)
f(x, y) = -x/6+y/2
@pgf Plot3(
    {
        surf,
    },
    Coordinates(x, y, f.(x, y'))
    )

1.5 backend

using Plots; 
pgfplotsx()
surface(range(-3,3, length=30), 
        range(-3,3, length=30),
        (x, y) -> -x^2-y^2,
        label=L"-x^2-y^2",
        size=(400,300),
        colorbar=false)
backend
